parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "generated_text": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Groq: Generate Letter'].json.choices[0].message.content) }},
  "status": "success",
  "qa_score_honesty": {{ JSON.parse($node['Groq: QA Review'].json.choices[0].message.content).honesty_score }},
  "qa_score_tone": {{ JSON.parse($node['Groq: QA Review'].json.choices[0].message.content).tone_score }},
  "qa_flags": {{ JSON.stringify(JSON.parse($node['Groq: QA Review'].json.choices[0].message.content).flags || []) }},
  "qa_retries": 0
}

meta.description: Cover letter generation pipeline: Webhook → Groq Generate → Groq QA Review → PUT callback to FastAPI. Import into n8n Cloud and set GROQ_API_KEY + N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET as environment variables.
